text:
Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has had thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day) effective 10/01/2023
883 TOT_SVRTY_SCRE_NUM TOT_SVRTY_SCRE_NUM D0160 Total severity score CHAR 2 The data in this column is the resident's total severity score. 00 to 27=Severity score
99=Unable to
